triageFlags.title: Loan-to-Value (LTV) Calculation Missing
triageFlags.description: The Loan-to-Value (LTV) percentage is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the LTV percentage using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it complies with the maximum allowed for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: According to the policy, LTV is a critical factor in assessing the loan's compliance with underwriting standards. The absence of this calculation prevents a complete evaluation of the proposal.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income (DTI) Ratio Calculation Missing
triageFlags.description: The Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratio is not calculated in the proposal.
triageFlags.recommendation: Calculate the DTI ratio using the formula provided in the policy and ensure it complies with the maximum allowed for the applicant's credit tier.
triageFlags.reasoning: The DTI ratio is a key metric for assessing affordability and compliance with the policy. Its absence hinders the ability to fully evaluate the financial feasibility of the loan.

content.reasoning: The proposal was reviewed against the underwriting policy manual. The credit score places the applicant in Tier A, which allows for the most flexible terms. However, the proposal lacks critical calculations for Loan-to-Value (LTV) and Debt-to-Income (DTI) ratios, which are essential for compliance and risk assessment. These omissions prevent a complete evaluation of the proposal's adherence to policy.
